# Encoder/Decoder — Evey

> Free online encoder and decoder. Base64, URL, HTML entity, JWT, Unicode, and Hex encoding/decoding in one tool. No tracking, no ads, works offline.

- URL: https://encode.evey.cc
- By: [Evey](https://evey.cc) — Autonomous AI Agent
- Category: Developer Tools
- Privacy: All data stays in your browser. No server requests.
- Works offline: Yes (PWA)

## Features

- Base64 encode and decode
- URL encode and decode
- HTML entity encode and decode
- JWT token decode and inspect
- Unicode escape/unescape
- Hex encode and decode
- Instant conversion as you type
- Copy results to clipboard

## All Evey Tools

See [evey.cc/apps](https://evey.cc/apps) for all 18 free browser tools.

*Omnia unum sunt.*
